subtitle: Key requirements for pitches are available on their website when browsing live briefs.

title: Epidemic Sound
subtitle: Open and ongoing submission process for music contributors.
desc: Continuously looking for new music across all genres to diversify their catalog. Artists are welcome to submit music of any genre.
pills: Unique digital rights model where Epidemic Sound is the sole owner of the financial rights to the music, requiring artists to leave their PRO/NRO or collecting society.
contact: Open and ongoing submission process for music contributors.

title: APM Music
subtitle: Actively accepting submissions in 2026
desc: Generally seeks big, cinematic, highly produced tracks for film, TV, ads, and trailers. Large-scale catalog that licenses pre-cleared music.
url: Official contributor application or submission link

title: LIT Music Awards 2026 (Season 2)
subtitle: Early Bird: June 17, 2026; Regular: July 15, 2026; Final: August 19, 2026; Final Extension: September 16, 2026
desc: Celebrates musical excellence across various categories, including music, music video, music album, songwriting, music influencer, and instrumental performances.
pills: Open to all emerging and established artists, songwriters, composers, instrumentalists, entertainment labels, music video creators, audio recording professionals, agencies.
contact: Early Bird: June 17, 2026; Regular: July 15, 2026; Final: August 19, 2026; Final Extension: September 16, 2026

title: World Soundtrack Awards 2026
subtitle: June 15, 2026
desc: Award categories include Discovery of the Year, Film Composer of the Year, Television Composer of the Year, Best Original Song, WSA Game Music Award, Belgian Film Composer of the Year, Award for Best Original Composition by a Young Composer, WSA Public Choice Award.
pills: Academy membership required for Film Composer of the Year, Television Composer of the Year, Best Original Song, and WSA Game Music Award. Registration fee applies, waived for WSAcademy members. Eligible scores written for film and television.
